title: mandevilla antioquiana
intro: Mandevilla antioquiana, also known as the "Pink Mandevilla" or "Diploria", is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health conditions. The health benefits of Mandevilla antioquiana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain and swelling, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Mandevilla antioquiana include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to make teas, salves, and other topical applications.
